rules.rule_text:
rule php_obfuscation
{
	meta:
		author = "@KevTheHermit"
		info = "Part of PasteHunter"
		reference = "https://github.com/kevthehermit/PasteHunter"

	strings:
		$a = "eval(" nocase
		$b = "gzinflate(" nocase
		$c = "base64_decode("
		$d = "\\142\\x61\\163\\145\\x36\\x34\\137\\144\\x65\\x63\\x6f\\x64\\x65"
		$e = "str_rot13("

	condition:
		2 of them
}
